name: xept-auto-accept
description: Automatically accepts agent steps, terminal commands, and permission prompts in Antigravity IDE. Zero-config, background mode, safety-first.

commands.title: Xept: Restore Original Shortcuts (还原快捷方式)

xept.cdpPort.description: CDP debugging port. Xept will also scan nearby ports automatically.

xept.blockedCommands.description: Terminal command patterns to NEVER auto-run (e.g. 'rm -rf', 'git push --force').

xept.allowedCommands.description: If non-empty, ONLY auto-run commands matching these patterns. Blocklist takes priority.

xept.customButtonTexts.description: Extra button texts to auto-click (e.g. i18n labels).

xept.autoRun.description: Auto-click Run buttons for terminal commands. Dangerous commands are still blocked by the safety filter.

xept.autoAcceptFileEdits.description: Auto-accept file edit buttons (Accept, Accept All, Keep, Apply, Save). Set false to review diffs first.

xept.autoAllow.description: Auto-allow permission prompts (Allow, Always Allow, Allow Once). Set false to manually approve each permission.

xept.autoRetryEnabled.description: Auto-click Retry/Continue on agent errors (with circuit breaker: max 3 retries per 60s).

xept.acceptDelay.description: Delay in ms before auto-accepting file edits (review window). 0 = instant.

xept.runDelay.description: Delay in ms before auto-clicking Run buttons. 0 = instant.

xept.retryDelay.description: Delay in ms before auto-clicking Retry/Continue buttons. Gives you time to decide when errors occur (e.g. quota exhausted).
